title: Evangelion games CG packs
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion games CG packs             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Oct 22, 2012 9:14 am Well, recently I noticed that the Asuka pics from Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Complement Project are not very common on the internet, I've been running some reverse image searches that gave few or no results, so I decided to fix this "problem" (INB4: it's only because I'm a nice person, I don't like Asuka or anything ). You can download the whole set from here or you can see directly the pictures from the Picasa albums that I prepared: Rei's events Asuka's events Rei's endings Asuka's endings Rei's outfits Asuka's outfits Scenes' screens Battle's screens Faces/avatars Room's screens Titles' screens Credit's screens Various other graphics Thumbnails Sorry for the silly folders' names but some of this stuff could be considered pretty much useless, but I wanted to post the whole rip so I tried to catalogue them. I would like to point out that compared to the PC version Rei's CGs are probably lower resolution, without mentioning that these PS2's ones seem to have darker colours, anyway I can't confirm it directly for now. Also, most people won't really care about these technical details but I resized the images to correct the AR, the NTSC PS2 has 14/15 PAR, and I think that the "outfits" pics had an alpha channel which unfortunately was turned into a solid colour by the program that I used to extract the graphics. I also ripped the opening video, you can watch it on Youtube or download it from Mediafire . List of uploaded CG rips: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Complement Project (PS2 version, corrected colours) Secret of Evangelion (PC version, Chinese) Shinji Ikari Raising Project (partial rip) Ayanami Raising Project (PC version) Girlfriend of Steel 2nd (PS2 version): part 1 , part 2 Girlfriend of Steel 2nd (PSP version) Meitantei Evangelion Girlfirend of Steel 2nd (PC version): part 1 , part 2

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Oct 22, 2012 9:39 am Well thank you for making the effort to do this! Nice to see that Rei has a Lupin III ending .

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon Oct 22, 2012 5:59 pm Oh, God! Hyper, you don't know how long I've tried to find screencaps of the Asuka side of that game. Well done!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 22, 2012 6:18 pm I've found an incomplete version of rips from the game awhile ago, it's nice to have a more complete set. Love the anime-style graphics, too bad the Shinji Raising game doesn't have 'em. (FWIW I have a copy of the PS2 version of Ayanami with Asuka, brought it several years back and love it.) Thanks Hyper!

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Oct 22, 2012 10:20 pm barrels of cute Thank you Hyper!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Oct 23, 2012 9:05 am I'm glad to see that you guys and gals liked it. Does anyone have any request for some other CG pack? I should be capable of extracting the graphics from almost every PC/PSX/PS2/Saturn game thanks to the Westside tools, even though Evangelion 2 is between the unfortunate exceptions like I mentioned in the NG2 thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Wed Oct 24, 2012 3:43 pm Hyper, do you have access to Secret of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Pandymint » Wed Oct 24, 2012 4:35 pm Looking at these wonderful CGs makes me want to play the game. Gahh. Thanks for the download, Hyper.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Oct 24, 2012 4:51 pm They're all so cute! What is up with this. I want this game now. Fo da cyoot. Notes  SPOILER: Show

[]: Secret of Evangelion CG pack             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 25, 2012 9:51 am Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: Hyper, do you have access to Secret of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:40 pm Do you know which game this is? Please don't do those snarky, "Minecraft," remarks, despite the post asking for it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:42 pm Stryker wrote: Do you know which game this is?

[]: Re: Evangelion games CG packs             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:53 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Complement Project

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:59 pm The Playstation 2 version is fairly old, I don't know if you can buy it as new any more, the DS version is still available on YesAsia and probably other stores too. Anyway the game is in Japanese and I doubt that we'll ever see it in English, there's an official Chinese (ROC/Taiwan) version and a Russian fan-translated version of the original PC game (without Asuka) but I doubt that they would be of much use.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Oct 25, 2012 4:29 pm I am currently learning Chinese, and know a little of Russian. But it will be long before I am fluent enough to be able to play a game in either languages, let alone translate from languages. Rosetta Stone would be my friend, but its reading and writing lessons suck the fat one.

[]: Re: Secret of Evangelion CG pack             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Fri Oct 26, 2012 12:36 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Sure thing, actually I was already working on it.

[]: Shinji Ikari Raising Project CG pack             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Oct 27, 2012 3:08 pm Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: Hyper, I could totally kiss you! SoE was a big inspiration for my FF, having these images really helps a lot. Thanks!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Oct 27, 2012 7:15 pm I honestly hadn't played SoE but read a detailed synopsis when it came out. I got really intrigued when I saw some of the screencaps (especially where the agent gets Asuka to EVA-02 during EoE) and incorporated ideas into my 2nd Blue Rose story from what I saw. Now that I've seen the rest of the story visuals it makes me want to try and play the game once I download a copy. I've never seen a walkthrough of this game on the Interwebs. I don't suppose you've got that too, have you?

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Sat Oct 27, 2012 8:47 pm As great as these are, they're also painful reminders of the fact that nobody will ever translate these Raising Project games.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Oct 29, 2012 10:08 am Appreciate all the hard work! As a suggestion, what about updating the first thread with links to subsequent rips? However keep posting the updates as responses as well.
